name: Profluent E1
description: Generate embeddings given protein sequence. Predict the fitness of zero-shot substitution mutants against a wild type parent. Score single mutants of a parent sequence.
capabilities: Predict the fitness of zero-shot substitution mutants against a wild type parent
Score single mutants of a parent sequence

sequence.description: Protein amino acid sequence for embedding generation or fitness prediction

mutant_positions.description: Positions to score single mutants, comma-separated
